entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A food legume important for global food and nutritional demand.

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: Approaches used in crop improvement programs to enhance genetic traits.

entities.name: NEXT GENERATION SEQUENCING
entities.description: Technology used to generate thousands of markers through large scale genome sequencing.

entities.name: INDELS
entities.description: PCR-based insertion-deletions used as a co-dominant and highly polymorphic genotyping solution.

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism using markers.

entities.name: GENOMICS ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach utilizing genomic resources to improve crop varieties.

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME RE-SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of sequencing the entire genome of multiple lines to identify genetic markers.

entities.name: DINDEL SOFTWARE
entities.description: Software used for the identification of InDels from sequencing data.

entities.name: AGAROSE GEL
entities.description: A medium used for the validation of InDel markers and observation of polymorphism.

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM RATE
entities.description: The rate of genetic variation observed across parental lines for specific markers.
